name: Black Walnut Sundae
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream sugar and cocoa together until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Sift flour, soda, and salt together; add to the mixture alternately with milk, starting and ending with flour.
4. Mix in flavoring and fold in chopped nuts.
5. Divide batter evenly among three greased and floured 9-inch layer pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
1. In a double boiler over low heat, mix sugar, egg whites, water, cream of tartar, and salt until the mixture reaches soft peaks.
2. Gradually add marshmallows to the mixture; remove from heat and beat another 5 minutes.
3. Add flavorings and spread the icing evenly over the cooled cake layers.
4. Sprinkle chopped nuts over the top for garnish.
